yogaVideos.title: Pregnancy Yoga With Classical Music For Baby Brain Development
yogaVideos.description: A gentle pregnancy yoga session accompanied by classical music designed to support your baby's brain development. This practice combines safe movements with soothing melodies for a nurturing experience.
yogaVideos.instructions: Find a comfortable space with a yoga mat. Wear comfortable clothing. Listen to your body and modify poses as needed. Stay hydrated throughout the practice.

yogaVideos.title: PREGNANCY LOWER BACK PAIN RELIEF
yogaVideos.description: Quick and effective lower back pain relief specifically designed for pregnancy. Gentle stretches and movements to alleviate common pregnancy back discomfort in just 10 minutes.
yogaVideos.instructions: Use a yoga mat or comfortable surface. Move slowly and listen to your body. Use pillows or blocks for support. Stop if you feel any pain or discomfort.

yogaVideos.title: Prenatal Yoga - 5 Poses for All Trimesters
yogaVideos.description: Join Adriene for a complete prenatal yoga session featuring 5 essential poses that are safe and beneficial for all stages of pregnancy. A comprehensive practice for expecting mothers.
yogaVideos.instructions: Have a yoga mat, pillows, and water nearby. Modify poses as needed for your comfort. Take breaks whenever necessary. Focus on breathing throughout the practice.

yogaVideos.title: full body pregnancy pilates workout for all trimesters
yogaVideos.description: A full body pregnancy pilates workout that's safe and effective for all stages of pregnancy. Low-impact exercises to strengthen, tone, and improve overall fitness during pregnancy.
yogaVideos.instructions: Perform on a yoga mat or soft surface. Keep movements controlled and precise. Focus on core engagement while protecting your belly. Breathe steadily throughout.

yogaVideos.title: PREGNANCY YOGA | All Trimesters + Levels | Deep Full Body Stretch
yogaVideos.description: A comprehensive pregnancy yoga session featuring deep, full body stretches suitable for all trimesters and fitness levels. Release tension, improve flexibility, and feel amazing throughout your pregnancy.
yogaVideos.instructions: Have yoga blocks or cushions nearby for support. Move slowly into each stretch. Never bounce or force a stretch. Hold stretches for several breaths. Stay hydrated.

yogaVideos.title: BEDTIME YOGA
yogaVideos.description: Wind down before sleep with this gentle bedtime yoga routine designed for pregnancy. Calming poses and breathing techniques to help you relax and prepare for restful sleep.
yogaVideos.instructions: Practice in comfortable sleepwear. Dim the lights. Use pillows for extra comfort. Do this routine in bed or on a mat beside your bed. Focus on slow, calming breaths.

yogaVideos.title: Home Yoga Practice
yogaVideos.description: A complete home yoga practice designed for convenience and comfort during pregnancy. No special equipment needed - perfect for practicing in your own space at your own pace.
yogaVideos.instructions: Find a comfortable space at home. Wear comfortable clothing. Follow along at your own pace. Modify poses as needed for your comfort and trimester.
